steps.title: Use the working-together clue
steps.content: The play was written by both Hurston and Hughes. The next sentence explains that most writers prefer working alone and that working together damaged their friendship, so the blank must name joint creative work.

steps.title: Name joint authorship
steps.content: Choice A and choice B name literary activities but not coauthoring. Choice D refers to commercial activity. "Collaboration" directly describes authors working together on a play. The answer is C.
